Llama-3.1-8B thinks spider without saying it

The model is asked how many legs the web-spinning animal has. It answers "eight" and never says "spider" - but these panels read its internal layers mid-computation and catch the unspoken word. Method: Jacobian lens (Anthropic, 2026), fitted here on Llama-3.1-8B-Instruct. Read the writeup. ?
